Separate portions of kataifi dough into managable handfuls, seperating strands lightly to avoid cooking together
Fry in small batches, using a fine mesh spider to remove from fryer.
Fry until golden brown and crispy
Reserve to sheet trays lined with resting racks, with paper between fried kataifi and the rack.
Season with salt immediately after removing from fryer.
Dry out under heat lamps or somwhere warm and dry to drain all excess oil.
Reserve in quart containers in a cool, dry place with silica gel packets and a C-Fold towel on the bottom.
